chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1217 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 4832/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 4833/25 4.For orders on CMA 4834/25 5.For hearing of main case 30-07-2025 Mr. Yaseen Ali Ghunio, Advocate along with petiotner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Through instant petition, petitioner has challenged her transfer through impugned order dated 23.07.2025, issued by the respondent No.4, whereby she has been relieved from her present duties and directed to report to the Health Department, Government of Sindh Karachi. Admittedly, the petitioner is a civil servant and this Court has no jurisdiction to entertain the same in view of bar contained under Article 212 of the Constitution. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application(s) stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
